creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
Again me...
I found page:
http://wiki.blender.org/index.php/Dev:Doc/Building_Blender/FreeBSD

Is it possible that is the problem related to clang?
I built the Blender with default FreeBSD clang version 3.4.1 (tags/RELEASE_34/dot1-final 208032) 20140512
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd10.2
Thread model: posix

Thank you.
